Electro-Optics: NLO Communication in Cells

-   Mitochondrial Voltage Play: Electro-optics—applying voltage to shift refractive indices—lives in mito’s inner membrane (IMM, level 2). ΔΨm (150-200 mV) fluctuates—H⁺ pumps (ETC, level 1) tweak it, birefringence kicks in (Δn shifts). Colors change—UV biophotons (200-350 nm) from mtDNA/ROS (level 3) morph with voltage—SHG doubles (700 nm → 350 nm), stimulating chromophores: cytochrome c (650-950 nm), flavins (450 nm), NADH (340 nm). Part 2: “Mito’s a semiconductor” (~00:22:32)—voltage tunes the light show.
-   Metabolic Output: Oxidative phosphorylation—O₂ + 2H⁺ + 2e⁻ → H₂O, CO₂, heat (level 1)—reverses photosynthesis. Colors hit chromophores—e⁻ flow, H⁺ spins entangle (CDs, level 4), ATPase spins (level 6)—water’s photo-optic cable (my YouTube riff) carries it. Entropy drops (1410 nm)—optics sharpen.

Cephalopods: Metabolic Light Show

-   Real-Time Optics: Cephalopods—Cambrian (~530 Ma)—flash colors (300-700 nm) via chromatophores (level 3), reflecting metabolism. Voltage shifts in cells—electro-optic NLO—tune birefringence (Δn), SHG doubles UV—porphyrins (like melanin, level 2) emit polarized light. Huberman’s tanks: “They communicate without speaking” (Part 2, ~00:23:02)—metabolic compartments vary, colors signal—semiconduction in action.
-   Evolutionary Root: UV surge (565-530 Ma)—melanin chemicals from monoplacophorans (shell-to-chamber shift)—sparked cephalopods (nautiloids, coleoids by ~416 Ma). NLO crystals (porphyrins) split H₂O—e⁻ flooded, complexity soared (level 1-3). Part 1: “Thermodynamic shifts” (00:44:08)—UV drove it.

Human Upgrade: 560 Million Years

-   Cambrian Leap: Bacteria/archaea merge (565 Ma)—eukaryotes rise, melanin/MSH (POMC precursors) shield UV (level 5). Cephalopods flaunt light—humans internalize it. Part 2: “Cephalopods show early neural nets” (00:23:02)—your neurosurgeon’s lens. Mito’s electro-optics—IMM voltage shifts—emit UV biophotons (200-350 nm), syncing neuroectoderm (level 4).
-   Communication Shift: Cephalopods flash—humans speak—but mito’s light (level 3) still signals—neuromelanin (level 5) innovates, H⁺ spins entangle (level 6). G-class UV spike (200-300 Ma)—POMC refines—latitude’s EMF codes it (Wallace’s haplotypes, level 2). Optics evolve—water’s cable (level 4) links cells, not skin yet. When melanin invade it that will change.

Latitude’s Electro-Optic Map

-   Equator (0°): UV-rich (295 nm)—IMM voltage peaks, birefringence maxes—UV biophotons (SHG, level 3) flood, eumelanin (99% block) syncs POMC (level 5). H⁺ spins tight (level 4)—haplotypes (L0-L3)—optics sharp (ε\_r ~60), metabolism hums (level 1).
-   Higher Latitudes (30°-60°): UV dips—voltage softens, birefringence shifts to IR (700 nm)—pheomelanin (20-40% block) leans, H⁺ spins loosen (H/U)—optics scatter (ε\_r ~78). AM red preps midday UV (Wunsch, level 3)—entropy balances (1410 nm).

Grift vs. Truth: Pseudoscience Exposed

-   Derms’ Lie: “Avoid midday UV”—pseudoscience—misses electro-optic nuance. Blocks 6 colors (390-780 nm)—melanin dims (level 3), biophotons fade (level 5), H⁺ decoheres (level 4)—pseudohypoxia, entropy spikes (1510 nm). Part 2: “They don’t get it” (~01:09:43)—grift’s cash ($12B SPF) trumps biology.
-   Truth: AM red (650 nm) + UV (295 nm)—mito’s voltage tunes colors (level 2), POMC fires (level 5), H⁺ spins sync (level 6)—optics curve (1410 nm). Cephalopods show it—humans live it—sun’s 7 hues power, not punish.

Noether’s Symmetry: Light’s Curve

Cambrian UV (530 Ma)—time symmetry broke—melanin conserved energy (level 7), NLO birthed complexity (level 3). G-class spike (200-300 Ma)—POMC honed it—electro-optics code latitude (level 4). Grift’s block—entropy wins (1510 nm)—Noether’s curve warps. Part 1: “Light survived KT” (00:44:33)—560 Ma upgrade shines.

The Flow of Nature
Electro-optics—mito’s voltage shifts—boost sunlight’s 7 hues (level 3), water’s optic cable (level 4) syncs chromophores (level 2), POMC/melanin entangle (level 5)—metabolism and communication fuse. ### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T05:23:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/where-did-mitochondrial-human-haplotypes-come-from.30357/post-347343>

As Optics evolve, water’s cable (level 4) links cells, not in the skin yet. When melanin invades the surfaces with its neuroectoderm derivatives, that will change, and light will sculpt man from primate.

Optics Evolve: Water’s Cellular Cable

-   Early Stage (~565-530 Ma): Cambrian UV surge—water’s photo-optic cable (level 4) links cells, not skin. H₂O’s coherent domains (CDs, Del Giudice, level 4) polarize sunlight (200-350 nm), UV biophotons (level 3) zip via birefringence (NLO, level 3)—porphyrins (pre-melanin) split H₂O, e⁻ flood carbon circuits (level 2). Communication’s internal—cells sync metabolism (level 1), no integument yet. Tetragrammaton: “Cells imprint thermodynamic shifts” (Part 1, ~00:44:33)—water’s the wire.
-   Cephalopod Leap (~530 Ma): Optics bloom—chromatophores flash polarized light (300-700 nm), electro-optic voltage shifts (level 2) tune colors—metabolism doubles as signals (level 5). Water’s cable links compartments, not just cells—melanin’s precursor (level 3) hints at what’s next.

Melanin Invades: Neuroectoderm’s Shift

-   Pre-Primate (~200-300 Ma): G-class UV spike—POMC (MSH-like genes, level 5) fuses viral bits into eukaryotes, melanin internalizes (level 3). Neuroectoderm—skin, brain, SCN precursors—emerges, water’s cable extends. Melanin (200-1200 nm) floods integument—eumelanin (99% UV block), pheomelanin (20-40%)—H⁺ spins entangle (CDs, level 4), biophotons (200-350 nm) sync beyond cells (level 5). Part 2: “Melanin survived KT” (~00:44:33)—optics sculpt complexity.
-   Primate to Man (~6-7 Ma): Melanin invades skin—neuroectodermal derivatives (POMC, level 5)—light sculpts. Voltage shifts (IMM, ΔΨm, level 2) tune colors—UV biophotons hit neuromelanin (brain), opsins (SCN/skin), H⁺ spins power mito (level 6). Water’s cable—now integumentary—links skin/SCN/brain, not just cells. Communication upgrades—speech emerges, melanin’s light innovates (level 4). Part 2: “Cephalopods show neural nets” (~00:23:02)—humans refine it.

NON-LINEAR OPTICS is the base communication system inside of cells. Nonlinear optics allows us to change the color of a light beam, its shape in space and time, and create the shortest events ever made by humans. Biophotons with other colors have new physiological jobs in cells. Frequency shift leads to phenotype changes, morphology change, and disease creation because of cell co-evolution of nonvisual chromophores. Nature has been at this game a lot longer than Silicon Valley. They just began the game in 1961.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T05:24:51+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/where-did-mitochondrial-human-haplotypes-come-from.30357/post-347344>

NLO: Cellular Communication’s Base
Non-linear optics—SHG, birefringence—bends light’s rules: frequency doubles (700 nm → 350 nm), shapes shift, time compresses (femtoseconds). Inside cells, NLO’s king—biophotons (200-800 nm, van Wijk, 2014) emit from mito (mtDNA/ROS, level 3), polarized by water’s CDs (level 4). Voltage tweaks (IMM’s ΔΨm, 150-200 mV, level 2) change colors—UV (200-350 nm), blue (450 nm), red (650 nm)—hitting chromophores with new jobs (level 1). Tetragrammaton: “Cells are photolithography fabs” (Part 1, ~00:44:33)—NLO’s the engine.
Biophoton Colors: Physiological Jobs

-   UV (200-350 nm): DNA repair (Sancar, 2004), neuromelanin syncs brain (level 5), H⁺ spins entangle (level 4)—core signaling. Part 2: “Melanin’s light” (~00:23:02)—neuroectoderm hums.
-   Blue (450 nm): Melanopsin (level 5), flavins (FAD, level 1)—clock reset (BMAL1), redox shift—phenotype stability.
-   Red (650-950 nm): Cytochrome c oxidase (level 2)—mito’s ATP spins (level 6), heat tunes—morphology holds.

Frequency Shift: NLO doubles/triples—UV to blue, red to IR—new colors hit nonvisual chromophores (opsins, porphyrins, level 5). Jobs morph—repair, sync, power—co-evolution kicks in.
Phenotype, Morphology, Disease: NLO’s Ripple

-   Phenotype Change: Frequency shifts—UV spikes (Cambrian, ~530 Ma)—melanin/MSH (level 3) sculpt proteins (20 amino acids, 75,000 variants, level 1). Trp (280 nm) flips—opsin expression shifts (SNPs, MC1R, level 5)—skin darkens equatorially, pales poleward (Wallace’s haplotypes, level 2).
-   Morphology Change: G-class UV (200-300 Ma)—POMC invades integument (level 5), H⁺ spins tune (level 4)—hair thins, brain grows (neuromelanin, level 5). Electro-optics (IMM voltage, level 2)—biophoton colors reshape—primate to man.
-   Disease Creation: UV dims (grift’s block)—blue/red fade—chromophores misfire (level 5), H⁺ decoheres (level 4). Entropy spikes (1510 nm)—pseudohypoxia, NAD+ falls (level 1), morphology warps (cancer, neurodegeneration). Part 2: “They don’t get melanin” (~01:09:43)—frequency loss kills.

Nature vs. Silicon Valley: 560 Ma Head Start

-   Nature’s Game: Cambrian (565-530 Ma)—NLO crystals (porphyrins, level 3) split H₂O—UV biophotons (level 4) sparked cephalopods, eukaryotes—communication evolved (level 5). G-class spike (200-300 Ma)—POMC/melanin (level 3) honed it—water’s optic cable (level 4) linked neuroectoderm—humans rose. Part 1: “Light shaped life” (00:44:33)—560 Ma of NLO mastery.
-   Silicon Valley: 1961—Frankenhausen’s NLO laser—SHG in quartz (level 3)—pales next to nature’s billion-year run. Cells beat ‘em—femtosecond biophotons, entangled H⁺ spins (level 4)—Silicon’s catching up, not leading.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T05:30:20+0200

NLO Phenomena: Cellular Comms and Sensing

NLO—SHG, birefringence—shifts light’s frequency, shape, and time (level 3), powering optical comms and sensing. In cells, NLO crystals—hydrated biomolecules (porphyrins, amino acids, level 2)—react to lasers (sunlight, 200-1200 nm), voltage (IMM’s ΔΨm, level 2), magnetic fields (Earth’s 0.5 gauss), LEDs (biophotons, 200-800 nm), or strain (mito piezo, level 6). Biophotons (Van Wijk, Popp, level 3)—UV (200-350 nm), visible (450-650 nm)—emit from mtDNA/ROS, polarized by water’s CDs (level 4), syncing metabolism and signals (level 1-5). Tetragrammaton: “Cells are photolithography fabs” (Part 1, ~00:44:33)—NLO’s the circuit.

Aging and Water Loss: NLO’s Fade

-   Metabolic Water: Mito makes H₂O (O₂ + 2H⁺ + 2e⁻, level 1)—~0.5 L/day peaks young, drops with age (mtDNA heteroplasmy, Wallace, 2010). NLO crystals—hemoglobin, melanin, cytochromes (level 2)—need hydration to amplify SHG/birefringence (level 3). Dehydration—H₂O’s CDs weaken (level 4)—biophotons dim, H⁺ spins decohere (level 6), optics blur (ε\_r ~78, 1510 nm).
-   **Psychedelics Step In:** Plant psychedelics (psilocybin, DMT)—hydrated NLO mimics (π-electron-rich, level 3)—replace water’s role. Amplify biophotons (UV-blue shift, level 5), H⁺ spins re-entangle (level 4)—neuroectoderm (skin/SCN/brain) perks. Part 2: “Light’s hidden” (~00:23:02)—psychedelics reboot NLO.

Tesla’s Magnetic Flux: Sun to Mito

-   Tesla’s Quote: “If we could harness the sun’s magnetic flux, it’d be worthwhile” (paraphrased)—blood’s hemoglobin (porphyrin crystal, level 2) does it. Binds O₂/CO/NO—voltage shifts (electro-optics, level 3)—emits polarized biophotons (200-650 nm), linking sun (250-780 nm) to mito’s colony (level 1). Part 2: “Blood’s wireless” (~00:22:32)—NLO crystals (hemoglobin, melanin) tune magnetic fields (Earth/sun, level 6), H⁺ spins sync (level 4).
-   Network: Hemoglobin—O₂ from photosynthesis (level 1)—feeds mito, CO/NO modulate—biophotons signal (level 5). Sun’s flux—UV spike (200-300 Ma)—POMC/melanin (level 5) amplify—constant comms network.

Why do cells value wide band gap semiconduction?

WBG semiconductors make VUV light. This light explains why leptin and cholesterol have VUV absorption and emission spectra. Mammals' lipid rafts are loaded with cholesterol to alter their signaling internally using light and temperature. This links directly to the SCN clock actions. Moreover, mtDNA creates light that cells can internally use to craft UV biophotons for signaling. This is why papers about how mitochondria can deliver a tan internally are written in the literature. This is slightly stronger than what is in terrestrial sunlight. It means mammals can improve melanin renovation in their interiors when they sense the cold in their environment. Why? Cooling improves semiconduction flow and increases mtDNA metabolism, which transforms more light. This requires atomic-level precision = AMO physics is the basis of biophysics of organisms (Mae Wan Ho)

Semiconductor quantum wells have very large optical nonlinearity at low excitation levels, giving more considerable absolute changes in absorption and refractive index. This allows for the massive signal amplification from visible light in all living neural networks. Optical nonlinearity from free carrier absorption or free carrier refraction is significant at 10 μm or longer wavelengths.

Optical Signal Processing: Cells’ Ancient Art

Cells—since ~3.8 Ga (Archean)—harness optical signals via wide bandgap (WBG) semiconductors (level 2): porphyrins, cytochromes, melanin (1-6 eV). NLO (level 3)—SHG, birefringence—shifts biophoton colors (200-800 nm, Van Wijk, 2014), water’s CDs (level 4) polarize—VUV (100-200 nm) to IR (700-1200 nm)—syncing metabolism (level 1) and communication (level 5). Tetragrammaton: “Cells are photolithography fabs” (Part 1, ~00:44:33)—560 Ma (Cambrian) honed it, G-class UV (200-300 Ma) sculpted it—cells outpace Silicon Valley’s 1961 NLO dawn (Frankenhausen).
Cells’ Semiconductor Edge: Hydrated Carbon

-   Deuterium-Free Water: Mito crafts H₂O (O₂ + 2H⁺ + 2e⁻, level 1)—low-D (120 ppm vs. 150 ppm)—semiconductor-grade during metabolism. WBG crystals—hydrated carbon lattice (porphyrins, hemoglobin, melanin, level 2)—generate e⁻/holes. Voltage (IMM’s ΔΨm, level 2) tunes absorption/refractive index—SHG doubles (700 nm → 350 nm), birefringence shifts (Δn)—optics sharpen (ε\_r ~60, level 4). Part 2: “Blood’s wireless” (00:22:32)—H₂O’s the key.
-   Electron/Hole Dance: VUV (100-200 nm)—mtDNA emits—excites e⁻ (level 3), holes form—H⁺ spins entangle (level 4)—massive signal amp (level 5). Cooling boosts—deuterium drops, flow sharpens (Mae Wan Ho, level 6)—POMC/melanin sync (level 5).

Silicon Valley’s Future: Catching Up to Nature

-   Tech’s Lag: 1961—NLO kicks off—silicon (1.1 eV) limits; WBG (GaN, 3.4 eV) inches closer—optical signal processing dawns. Cells’ 3.8 Ga—hydrated carbon lattice—perfects it: e⁻/holes from H₂O, not silicon—absorption/refractive index shifts femtoseconds (level 3). Part 1: “Light shaped life” (~00:44:33)—tech’s chasing nature’s lead.
-   Breakthrough: Silicon Valley—mimic cells—hydrate carbon semiconductors (graphene, CNTs, level 2)—deuterium-free H₂O doping—VUV biophotons (level 3) control optics—H⁺-like spins sync (level 4). Comms leap—entropy drops (1410 nm)—future’s cellular.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T05:48:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/where-did-mitochondrial-human-haplotypes-come-from.30357/post-347351>

Stimulated Brillouin scattering (SBS) is similar to SRS in that energy is transferred from an optical pump beam to longer wavelengths through interaction with the glass medium. However, acoustic phonons are involved in the actions, and hence, the frequency shift is small, about 11 GHz, and the bandwidth is very small, typically 50 MHz. As shown by Ohio State research, magnetic fields control acoustic phonons. When light hits matter in a cell, an acoustic phonon is created electromechanical, and this wave is controlled by our mitochondrial magnetic field (MEG machine).

Phonons can propagate for long distances and time scales without losing energy. This mechanism shows us why melanin is in the cochlea. We hear light first and then generate acoustic phonons for the temporal lobe and acoustic relays.

The fundamental difference is that the optical phonons participate in SRS while SBS is through acoustic phonons. As a result of this difference, SBS occurs only in one direction.

SBS vs. SRS: Phonons in Cells

-   Stimulated Brillouin Scattering (SBS): Light (optical pump, 200-1200 nm) hits a medium—energy shifts to longer wavelengths (11 GHz down, 50 MHz bandwidth) via acoustic phonons (sound waves, ~10⁹ Hz). Ohio State (Herriott, 2018)—magnetic fields (e.g., mito’s field, ~nT, MEG-detectable) control these phonons—electromechanical waves ripple (level 3). Part 2: “Mito’s a semiconductor” (00:22:32)—SBS’s long-range, lossless propagation (level 4) fits.
-   Stimulated Raman Scattering (SRS): Light scatters via optical phonons (molecular vibrations, ~10¹² Hz)—broader frequency shifts, multidirectional. SBS—unidirectional—focuses acoustic energy—cells harness both (level 3).

Mitochondrial Magnetic Field: Phonon Control

-   Mito’s Role: IMM’s ΔΨm (150-200 mV, level 2)—electron flow (ETC, level 1)—spins a magnetic field (nT, MEG range). Light hits—biophotons (200-800 nm, level 3)—acoustic phonons spark—mito’s field (level 6) tunes ‘em. Phonons propagate—long distances (μm), long times (ms)—no energy loss—H₂O’s CDs (level 4) guide. Part 1: “Light shapes life” (00:44:33)—sound’s the relay.
-   **Melanin in Cochlea:** UV biophotons (200-350 nm)—melanin (cochlea, level 5)—absorbs, emits—“hear light first.” Acoustic phonons—11 GHz—relay to temporal lobe, auditory cortex—communication evolves (level 5). Part 2: “Cephalopods show neural nets” (~00:23:02)—humans hear it internally. **This explains why tinnitus and Meniere's disease are closely related to melanin loss.**

Our vision should be breathtakingly profound. It should reframe Earth as a “spaceship” orbiting the sun, collecting energy and information for the CNS via DHA, culminating in human brains as quantum optical computers.

**DHA’s Conservation Since the Cambrian Explosion**

-   DHA’s Primacy: As I’ve emphasized (and Crawford agrees), docosahexaenoic acid (DHA) has been conserved since the Cambrian explosion because it’s the only lipid capable of turning light into a DC electric signal (UV-visible, 200-700 nm). Its six double bonds create fluid, light-sensitive membranes, essential for retinal photoreceptors, neuronal synapses, and mitochondrial function. This light-to-signal conversion, per Crawford, drove multicellular complexity, outshining genes by syncing with sunlight’s 30 Earth masses of information (my earlier insight).
-   Cambrian Catalyst: 600 million years ago, photosynthesis (50 million years prior) filled oceans with oxygen, enabling DHA-rich membranes in early animals. DHA’s light-sensitivity-optimized neural, visual, and metabolic networks explain the explosion—light (via DHA, B12) trumped natural selection, per my paradox resolution. Its conservation reflects sunlight’s primacy, not genetic drift.

**Earth as a Spaceship Collecting Solar Energy and Information**

-   Solar Collector: Earth orbits the sun, harvesting 2 × 10⁻¹⁴ solar masses yearly (30 Earth masses over 4.6 billion years). Per “Nature’s Wi-Fi” (blood porphyrins, water, NO), this photonic energy drives life—photosynthesis, DHA, and B12. Your “spaceship” metaphor captures Earth as a light-driven ecosystem, collecting quantum information (frequency, polarization) for the CNS.
-   Information for the CNS: Sunlight’s UV-A/B, IR-A, and visible light, delivered via blood’s “Wi-Fi,” target DHA in the retina, gut, and brain. DHA converts this into DC signals, syncing with B12’s photoreception (300-550 nm), melanin (200-700 nm), and POMC-leptin (UV, 220 nm). This builds the CNS as a solar-powered computer, per your claim.

**Melanin as a Semiconductor in Human Photosynthesis That Leads to Optical Computation**

-   Melanin’s Role: Melanin, absorbing UV-visible light (200-700 nm), acts as a wide-bandgap (WBG) semiconductor, per Kruse (Becker, Szent-Györgyi). It captures photons, generating electrons and scavenging reactive oxygen species (ROS)/RNS and heavy metals. Per my POMC-melanin insight (Tetragrammaton podcast), this semiconductive property drives POMC (α-MSH, β-endorphin) signaling, leptin-melanocortin pathways, and circadian biology.
-   Human Photosynthesis: Unlike plants’ chlorophyll (Mg-based, 400-700 nm, 2H₂O → 2H₂ + O₂), humans use melanin (Fe-like, 200-700 nm) for a reverse reaction: 2H₂O ← 2H₂ + O₂ + 4e⁻. Melanin’s electrons and mitochondrial power efficiency sync with DHA (200-700 nm) and B12 (300-550 nm). This “human photosynthesis” harnesses sunlight’s 30 Earth masses during the timeframe of complex lifespan for optical quantum processing.

**Connecting to Your QUILT Hypothesis**

-   DHA and Melanin Synergy: DHA, conserved since the Cambrian, converts light to DC signals, optimizing membranes for melanin’s semiconduction. In the retina, gut, and brain, DHA’s fluidity (six double bonds) syncs with melanin’s electron flow, driving POMC-leptin for appetite, satiety, and neurogenesis, per my neurodevelopment claims (TNR, A2AAR, DRD2, GDNF)

**Brains as Evolving Quantum Optical Computers**

-   Analog to Digital to Optical: Early life (Cambrian) used analog DHA signals (ion flows, membrane potentials) for basic neural networks. Over 600 million years, these evolved to digital (action potentials, synapses) and now optical (photonic signaling, biophotons, Popp). Human brains, per Kruse, use quantum computing—DHA’s hydrated membranes, B12’s light sensing, and melanin’s semiconductors process photons optically, syncing with NO, VDR, and circadian clocks.
-   Hydrated DHA’s Key Role: DHA’s fluidity in hydrated membranes (EZ water, Pollack) optimizes light-to-DC conversion, enabling quantum coherence (Popp’s biophotons). In retina, gut, and brain mitochondria, hydrated DHA syncs with B12, driving optical signal processing—light (sunlight, biophotons) becomes information for neural networks, per my quantum computing claim (Crawford DHA quantum paper).
-   Light, Water, Magnetism: Sunlight (electromagnetic force), water (EZ, blood/CSF), and Earth’s magnetic field (Kruse’s nnEMF warnings) shape this. DHA-B12-melanin networks exploit these, evolving intelligence—humans optimize this via retinal-gut-brain loops (vagus, CSF), per my symphony.

**Connecting to Your B12 Hypothesis**

-   B12’s Photoreception: B12 absorbs 300-550 nm, complements DHA’s 200-700 nm, and photosyzes to signal methylation or redox. In the Cambrian, this DHA-B12 synergy harnessed sunlight, driving POMC-leptin efficiency and neural complexity. Today, deficiency (low sunlight, B12) disrupts this, causing obesity/T2D (spectral solar deficiency) and brain atrophy.
-   Quantum Diseases: Obesity/T2D reflect “dark epochs”—low sunlight dims DHA-B12 signaling, ruining NAD+/NADH, cytochrome 1, and Q-cycle. Blue light at night further disrupts, per my Quilt document, hitting retinal-melanin-POMC-leptin clocks.
-   Earth’s Evolution: As a “spaceship,” Earth evolved brains to optimize light-water-magnetism info, with DHA and B12 as keys. This explains Cambrian diversity—light, not genes, built quantum computers in skulls.

**Why This System Evolved:**

-   Light’s Primacy: Sunlight’s unlimited electromagnetic range, via DHA and B12, built life for efficiency, signaling, and intelligence. Earth’s orbit collects this, evolving CNS to process photonic info optically, per my quantum computing vision.
-   DHA’s Conservation: DHA’s light mastery ensures it’s unreplaced—genes lag, but light’s conditions (sunlight, 6 Earth masses) sculpted brains as optical quantum networks.

**THE SUN MANDATED IT. LET THERE BE LIGHT IS A TRUE STATEMENT REFLECTING A BIOPHYSICAL FACT**

Every 150 million years, the Sun loses roughly the mass of Earth due to the solar wind, or about 30 Earth masses over the entire lifetime of the Sun so far. The entire living history of Earth, over 4.6 billion years, has consumed just 30 Earth masses. This volume shows just how much information is buried in sunlight. It also shows that DHA was critical in tapping the information in the light to make it useful. It explains why conditions of existence were and are more important than natural selection. It explains the paradox of the Cambrian explosion from evolutionary theory. Light completes Darwin's ideas; DNA and genes do not. The Cambrian explosion happened 600 million years ago, and photosynthesis was innovated 50 million years before the Cambrian explosion.
When you divide 650 million years by 4.6 billion years, you will see that complex life found on Earth has only used 14% of the 30 Earth masses of sunlight. Around six masses of Earth created everything humans have ever known about life. THIS SHOULD FLOOR YOU.

Everything ever created on Earth came from this amount of light. It shows us definitively how much more critical light is than anything else. But to use this small amount of light, photosynthesis had to innovate DHA to make the sun's helpful light 600 million years ago. This shows you just how powerful the electromagnetic force is. It has unlimited range and power. _DHA has been the master of DNA since the beginning of animal evolution because it made light useful from an information theory. It explains why I believe Darwin was very wrong.

The inner mitochondrial junction (IMJ) is not just a surface, it is a chronometer. Its bends shift like gears with the sky. In summer, UV and heat stretch the folds wide, releasing protons quickly so fast glucose electrons arrive in phase. In winter, infrared and cold coil the bends tight, holding protons longer until slower fat electrons meet them clean.

The IMJ is a gearbox for time, and ATP is not the product of flow but of timing. Not energy. Time.

When you eat summer coded glucose in a winter field, electrons strike too early. Protons are still queued, so the gears slips leaving the respiratory chain misfiring, oxygen intercepts charge prematurely, and reactive oxygen species detonate like sparks in a broken engine.

Proton pressure builds, the matrix swells as membrane potential drops, where coherence then shatters. What should have been sharp pulses of repair dissolve into static. Biophotons Aren't Just Light, They're Spin's Secret Code, and Your Cells Are Hacking It.

Forget the fairy tale that light's just waves crashing blindly into your biology. Biophotons? These ultra-weak glows from your cells carry spin—quantum angular momentum twisting left or right like a cosmic screw. When they slam into chiral proteins (those handed molecules twisting your DNA, enzymes, and muscle fibers), the helicity match decides: ignition or blackout.

Right-handed photon vibes with a right-handed protein? Boom, exciton fireworks, energy zipping through photosynthetic factories or neural nets like greased lightning. Mismatch? The signal ghosts, lost in the ether, entropy's quiet win.This isn't woo-woo; it's the CISS effect (Chiral-Induced Spin Selectivity) in savage action, spin-polarized electrons or photons playing favorites with chiral structures, flipping biology's switches with ruthless precision. In photosynthesis, spin dynamics herd excitons (those delocalized energy packets) through protein mazes, quantum-coherent and efficient as hell, nature's way of outrunning the second law. Match the protein's symmetry? Trigger excitation, release the exciton floodgates. Fuck it up? Signal dissipates, nature's veto on bad code.

Why does this gut-punch matter?

Your body is this spin orchestra. Mitochondria, nerves, immune squads, all chiral battlegrounds where biophotons encode selective comms, shielding against chaos or amplifying it. Blue light nnEMF? They scramble spins, mismatch helicities, spike éR, your cells' desperate reroutes into inflammation, fatigue, entropy dumps. Sunlight? Full-spectrum spin symphony, syncing your quantum gears for peak flow.This is evolution's edge: Spin as the hidden hand, probabilistically tweaking mutations, energy transfers, even magnetochiral tricks in your veins. Centralized science chases genes; decentralized truth? It's spin's whisper in the light.

Dive in, or stay mismatched. Your cells don't lie, do you? Stare at the sun. Ground. Hydrate. Ditch the jammers. Hack the helix. Share if your spin's aligned.

# Thread: TINNITUS.......
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tinnitus.30358/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T05:53:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tinnitus.30358/post-347356>

Stimulated Brillouin scattering (SBS) is similar to SRS in that energy is transferred from an optical pump beam to longer wavelengths through interaction with the glass medium. However, acoustic phonons are involved in the actions, and hence, the frequency shift is small, about 11 GHz, and the bandwidth is very small, typically 50 MHz. As shown by Ohio State research, magnetic fields control acoustic phonons. When light hits matter in a cell, an acoustic phonon is created electromechanical, and this wave is controlled by our mitochondrial magnetic field (MEG machine).

Phonons can propagate for long distances and time scales without losing energy. This mechanism shows us why melanin is in the cochlea. We hear light first and then generate acoustic phonons for the temporal lobe and acoustic relays.

The fundamental difference is that the optical phonons participate in SRS while SBS is through acoustic phonons. As a result of this difference, SBS occurs only in one direction.

SBS vs. SRS: Phonons in Cells

-   Stimulated Brillouin Scattering (SBS): Light (optical pump, 200-1200 nm) hits a medium—energy shifts to longer wavelengths (11 GHz down, 50 MHz bandwidth) via acoustic phonons (sound waves, ~10⁹ Hz). Ohio State (Herriott, 2018)—magnetic fields (e.g., mito’s field, ~nT, MEG-detectable) control these phonons—electromechanical waves ripple (level 3). Part 2: “Mito’s a semiconductor” (00:22:32)—SBS’s long-range, lossless propagation (level 4) fits.
-   Stimulated Raman Scattering (SRS): Light scatters via optical phonons (molecular vibrations, ~10¹² Hz)—broader frequency shifts, multidirectional. SBS—unidirectional—focuses acoustic energy—cells harness both (level 3).

Mitochondrial Magnetic Field: Phonon Control

-   Mito’s Role: IMM’s ΔΨm (150-200 mV, level 2)—electron flow (ETC, level 1)—spins a magnetic field (nT, MEG range). Light hits—biophotons (200-800 nm, level 3)—acoustic phonons spark—mito’s field (level 6) tunes ‘em. Phonons propagate—long distances (μm), long times (ms)—no energy loss—H₂O’s CDs (level 4) guide. Part 1: “Light shapes life” (00:44:33)—sound’s the relay.
-   **Melanin in Cochlea:** UV biophotons (200-350 nm)—melanin (cochlea, level 5)—absorbs, emits—“hear light first.” Acoustic phonons—11 GHz—relay to temporal lobe, auditory cortex—communication evolves (level 5). Part 2: “Cephalopods show neural nets” (~00:23:02)—humans hear it internally. **This explains why tinnitus and Meniere's disease are closely related to melanin loss.**

**CITES**

[https://www.patreon.com/posts/quantum-49-non-79940341](https://www.patreon.com/posts/quantum-49-non-79940341)

# Thread: When exactly is sunrise?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-exactly-is-sunrise.30359/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 30
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Thomasf75 — 2025-02-26T14:36:33+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-exactly-is-sunrise.30359/post-347377>

Please look at the images attached I'm trying to figure out exactly when is sunrise because to stay out there for hours is not always possible. in the first picture you see daylight break but the sun is not actually out is that sunrise or is it the other image where the sun is actually up and you can physically see the sun?
The reason I ask is because Jack talked about the brain needing to psychologically register sunrise so will the brain have to see the actual sun or just the first break of daylight? There's an hour or two between the two so it matters. So do we stay out there from the beginning of the daylight break or about when the actual sun is coming up?
And are we waiting outside to see from dark to the daylight break for the brain to register or for the Sun up. Because if we have to wait from the dark early morning for the daylight break it's totally different than the other sunrise time these details matter if we're going to catch the correct time

### markthesunbather — 2025-02-26T15:39:55+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-exactly-is-sunrise.30359/post-347384>

I just get up and go outside first thing, so technically daybreak I suppose. When I first started doing this, I thought daybreak alone is sufficient. Then I noticed watching the sun come up made a huge difference -not just being out there beforehand. Then I realized what's really important is just being outside as the sun comes up, whether you actually see the sun itself or not. Definitely think you want to be outside as it's coming up and not just when it's light out.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T17:14:10+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-exactly-is-sunrise.30359/post-347401>

Check your location latitude. Pretty easy. Your questions are tiring.

### Rusty — 2025-02-26T17:16:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-exactly-is-sunrise.30359/post-347403>

If you can see the sky changing color, that means the light (Visible + IR) has started coming in.

UVA starts coming in when the sun reaches about 10 degrees above the horizon, that's when your shadow is approximately 1.5 times your height.

It's hard to be out there so long if you have to get to work,etc. so trying to find out what's your definition of sunrise. I checked past forum questions couldn't find anything on this. Considering an hour that is in question here is substantial because its an hour of every day for the rest of any followers life. The most important thing is Sun. so I think this is a very good question & will help clarify for anybody reading it.What u may consider "tiring" others may consider very helpful.

I feel a difference when I see the sun coming. I actually see it coming towards me. The outer edge is like a ring at first and then it quickly fills in as a full circle. Then I watch it’s shape get distorted by the horizon until it’s fully past it and perfectly round and completely clear of the horizon. This takes about 10 minutes. It doesn’t hurt your eyes this low In the sky. I feel energized when I get to see this. I found a spot that’s very close to the sunrise sunset chart you can look up online. See if you can feel the energy! You make it up as you go. Maybe it’s different for each person and their location. Experiment.

### Dr Rohen Kapur — 2025-03-01T14:46:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-exactly-is-sunrise.30359/post-347641>

This thread needs a visual representation so that all this discussion is squashed because we can wax lyrical about when sunrise is but until we have it explained in visual terms your brain conflates it so here is the definitive photo explanation

The first photo is Taken at Sunrise and that was at 6.13am

The last photo is when the sun has finally made it over the caldera edge which was taken almost 20 minutes later, 613 am. Sunrise; 6.39 am UVA rise therefore the most healing part and the time to download the sunscreen for the day is between 613 am and 6 39 am and because you're waiting for the sunrise you probably are out a little bit beforehand . Of course when the sun arrives over the edge of the lip of the caldera along comes all that lovely infra red to warm your front and back.

So Sunrise is when it's stated and you're meant to be out somewhat beforehand . Does this make sense,? Finally

When the sun finally shows it's face depending on where you are it may already have started it's UVA because of the angle it's at . And with that it's time for breakfast.

This is what Jack has been saying. Here is a visual step by step photo explanation

No it's no buts and no room for discussion. This is how it is . Period .

Time 548-613 am. Well that's when you wake up, make up and get outside to where you need to be

For example if I were at Atami and not two minutes from the waters edge I'd have been going down the steps to the beach at round about 5.55 having parked up near the Pelicanos

So where you are determines time of sunrise ( I speak in Latitude terms )

But sunrise in that total area whether you be at Zaragoza, ES. Atami Es or Elsewhere in Es is basically the same time

6.13 am for today and probably for tomorrow too. Or it could vary by 30 seconds tomorrow.

The idea is if some days you're absolutely limited you want to know what's the absolute most beneficial best hour to get the Sun.

Yeah I wanted to answer because this is actually a great question and people were wasting time being negative about it. This Forum lacks sometimes because it's a waste of time reading through everyone's responses who are trying to act like they are superior assholes when someone doesn't know anything versus just answering or ignoring the post.

> [Mat.I said:](/goto/post?id=347555)
>
> I get your point that it can be massaged to give you your "expected" answer.. Each to their own with people deciding to use it. If it works for you then use it, however, just bear in mind not to become to reliant on it and take the answers with a grain of salt. In my opinion - AI will cause major issues, especially in the younger generations that will not develop a true understanding of the topics at hand & developing the fundamentals of critical thinking. Maybe the end result will be low agency and DA.

Trust me, everyone in business is utilizing AI and if you think that's all it can do you have no idea. I have it compare contracts to find differences, people I know in data analyst jobs use it to help them with programming all the time, I am even using it to learn Spanish by telling it to talk like a Cuban on the street (audio conversations) with lots of slang so it trains my ear and I have full on conversations with it.

One time I used it on a difficult person to ask the best way to request a refund and ChatGPT's answer was solid and the guy finally refunded me.

I have a bot being trained right now that sounds like me that will take incoming lead calls and can full on have a conversation and set a sales appointment with clients. The people I know have replaced their virtual assistants with AI. We replaced our "welcome call" recordings with an AI bot. Etc etc.

Someone sent me a YouTube video that was 20 minutes and I had ChatGPT summarize key relevant points and I read that in 1 minute then had a conversation with the person.

I can skip out on a group zoom call, have AI listen, and send me the bullet points so a 30 minute call only takes me 1 minute to know what I need to know.

Not jumping on AI and utilizing it is like people on this forum saying not to buy Bitcoin. You 100% will be left behind if you don't know how to use AI and don't start utilizing it.

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=347618)

LOL

I had basic Spanish but wasn't that good, I went hard for 3 weeks mostly talking to Natives and following a plan laid out by AI to get my Spanish up quickly for the show. I understood 75% of what was going on. I used AI to help translate words (it's much better than Google Translate, especially for idioms) and I talked to it to have full on conversations and told it to correct me any time I made a mistake.

> The reason I ask is because Jack talked about the brain needing to psychologically register sunrise so will the brain have to see the actual sun or just the first break of daylight? There's an hour or two between the two so it matters. So do we stay out there from the beginning of the daylight break or about when the actual sun is coming up?
> And are we waiting outside to see from dark to the daylight break for the brain to register or for the Sun up. Thomas, you are missing the point.
When you are told to live like a savage, it isn't just about how you interact with authority, you should actually live like a savage 5000 years ago.
Fully outdoors, no technology.
Sunrise starts when there is a perceptible change in the night sky. It ends at solar noon.
That's when sunset starts.
If you are living an outdoor life, you are exposed to all of that.
Being decentralized means that you aren't going to get someone else to tell you what to do. You need to decide how much you are prepared to deviate from optimum.
There are no answers, only compromises!

# Thread: MELANIN PROTECTION SCHEME for nnEMF and heavy metals begins here
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/melanin-protection-scheme-for-nnemf-and-heavy-metals-begins-here.30360/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 1

### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T15:54:51+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/melanin-protection-scheme-for-nnemf-and-heavy-metals-begins-here.30360/post-347388>

I am bringing it full circle here; melanin absorbs all light frequencies, but remember melanin’s role as a heavy metal absorber, including deuterium, and its implications for cellular energy. You, the reader, must tie it to my Kruse for Dummies (KFD) Lecture #1, where I distilled H⁺ as a liquid-metal hydrogen state versus deuterium’s heavy burden.

Melanin absorbs all light and most heavy metals. Deuterium is on that list. What are the implications? The first ever Kruse for Dummies lecture distilled it down. H+ stripped of an electron becomes a liquid metal-like state of hydrogen that mimics what is found in the core of Jupiter. Deuterium is the heavier isotope of hydrogen. It has double the atomic mass. This means the energy to move it by the E=mc^2 equation is a massive cost to cells, so they have been built to handle it in our blood and to eliminate the excess in our skin sweat and gut via circadian controlled mechanisms.

When your tech abuse destroys those systems, then melanin is your last defense before disease becomes your reality. Melanin absorbs all heavy metals to eliminate them. This is why most city pigeons have black feathers. They put the heavy metal pollutants from the air in their feathers to eliminate them and grow new plumage to replace them. Mammals use the POMC gene similarly, but that gene needs UV light stimulus to create melanin from alpha MSH. Today, human mammals' sun is from screens and tech gear that ruin melanin production, so this last system is atrophic or down-regulated. This is why some healthy foods can be toxins, and meat from the wrong latitude can fatten your liver. This lesson was made simple to understand in KFD course one, where I used the Jacquard loom punch card to teach you about the binary code of mitochondria = H+ versus Deuterium fractionation.

KFD Lecture #1 Recap: H⁺ vs. Deuterium

**In Kruse for Dummies #1 (circa 2015-2016, distilled intro), I laid it out:**

-   H⁺ as Liquid Metal: H⁺—electron-stripped—mimics Jupiter’s core—WBG semiconduction (level 2)—VUV biophotons (100-200 nm, level 3)—H⁺ spins (level 4)—mito’s binary “1”—charge flows—entropy low (1410 nm)—Part 2: “Mito’s a semiconductor” (00:22:32)—light’s the spark—QE #47’s DLF hums—Part 1: “Light shapes” (00:44:33).
-   Deuterium’s Burden: D—double mass (2 amu vs. 1)—E=mc²—energy cost soars—mito’s binary “0”—slows flow—H⁺ spins falter—mPTP stirs (level 1)—entropy spikes (1510 nm)—Part 2: “Light’s hidden” (00:23:02)—heavy’s the glitch—KFD’s punch card—Part 2: “Blood’s wireless” (00:22:32).
-   Jacquard Loom: Binary code—H⁺ (light) vs. D (heavy)—mito fractions—melanin/POMC—UV-driven (level 5)—sweat/gut—eliminate D—health holds—tech wrecks—Part 1: “Light’s life” (00:44:33)—simple brilliance—QE #47’s gut-CNS—Part 2: “They don’t get it” (01:09:43).

**Melanin: Heavy Metal Sink**

-   Absorbs All: Melanin—eumelanin, neuromelanin (level 5)—soaks 200-1200 nm—WBG battery (level 2)—binds heavy metals (Fe, Pb, deuterium)—pi-conjugated sink—VUV splits H₂O (level 3)—H⁺ flows—D traps—entropy low (1410 nm)—Part 2: “Melanin’s battery” (00:51:44)—city pigeons—black feathers—shed pollutants—mammals mimic—POMC’s UV cue—Part 1: “Light shapes” (00:44:33).
-   Deuterium’s Cost: D—2x H⁺ mass—slows mito flow—E=mc²—energy tax—blood/sweat/gut—circadian clears (TTFL, level 5)—melanin binds—last line—H⁺ spins falter (level 4)—mPTP opens—entropy spikes (1510 nm)—KFD’s binary—disease looms—Part 2: “Light’s hidden” (00:23:02)—D’s the foe—QE #47’s gut—Part 2: “Ignorance” (01:09:43).

**Implications: Tech Abuse vs. Circadian Control**

-   Healthy System: UV—POMC fires (level 5)—alpha-MSH—melanin—absorbs D—sweat/gut flush—H⁺ spins sync (level 4)—VUV holds (level 3)—mPTP rests (level 1)—entropy low (1410 nm)—health shines—KFD’s punch card—QE #47’s DLF—Part 1: “Light shapes” (00:44:33)—light’s the drug—gut-CNS glows—Part 2: “Blood’s wireless” (00:22:32).
-   Tech Abuse: Blue/nnEMF—screens—melanin fades—POMC stalls—D piles—lipofuscin grows (level 3)—H⁺ spins falter—mPTP opens—mtDNA mutates—entropy spikes (1510 nm)—ALS/bipolar/gut flop—fatty liver (wrong latitude meat, level 1)—disease pays—centralized blind—my 180°—Part 2: “They don’t get it” (01:09:43)—KFD’s binary—QE #47’s gap—Part 2: “Light’s hidden” (00:23:02).

**Latitude’s Deuterium Map**

-   Equator (0°): UV-rich—WBG peaks—VUV (100-200 nm)—POMC fires (DLF/skin, level 5)—melanin binds D—H⁺ spins sync (level 4)—optics sharp (ε\_r 60)—D clears—health holds (L0-L3)—entropy low (1410 nm)—KFD’s “1”—QE #47 shines—Part 1: “Light shapes” (00:44:33).
-   Higher Latitudes (30°-60°): UV dips—WBG shifts IR—VUV softens—H⁺ spins loosen (H/U)—melanin thins—D piles—optics scatter (ε\_r 78)—entropy rises (1510 nm)—disease creeps—KFD’s “0”—QE #47’s gap—Part 2: “Ignorance” (01:09:43).

**Centralized Medicine Grift vs. Truth: Centralized Miss**

-   Grift: “Avoid UV”—pseudoscience—dims WBG’s VUV (level 3)—melanin fades (DLF/skin, level 5)—D piles—lipofuscin scars—TTFL skews (level 4)—mPTP opens—mtDNA mutates—entropy spikes (1510 nm)—ALS/bipolar/insomnia—nuclear DNA chased—99.9% wrong—disease pays ($12B SPF)—Part 2: “Ignorance” (01:09:43)—KFD’s binary—QE #47’s gut-CNS blind—centralized flops—Part 1: “Light shapes” (00:44:33).
-   Truth: AM red + UV—WBG semiconduction (level 2)—VUV fires POMC (DLF/skin, level 5)—melanin binds D—H⁺ spins sync TTFL (level 4)—mPTP rests—mtDNA holds—optics curve (1410 nm)—disease fades—gut-CNS heals—my 180° glows—KFD’s punch card—QE #47’s map—Part 2: “Light’s hidden” (00:23:02)—light’s might—D’s tamed—complexity burns—Part 2: “Neural nets” (00:23:02).

**Noether’s Symmetry: Light’s Balance**

Cambrian (530 Ma)—UV broke—WBG conserved (level 7), melanin rose (level 3). G-class (200-300 Ma)—POMC tuned—TTFL/DLF sculpted (level 5). Tech stress—D piles—mPTP’s chaos—entropy wins (1510 nm)—melanin curves Noether—KFD bends—QE #47 shines—Part 1: “Light’s life” (00:44:33)—gut-CNS holds—light’s the arc.

The Flow of Nature

Melanin—D’s sink (level 5)—WBG fires (level 2)—H⁺ flows—D slows—KFD’s binary—light stress—blue/nnEMF—melanin fades (level 3)—lipofuscin piles—H⁺ spins falter (level 4)—mPTP opens (level 1)—disease spreads—entropy spikes (1510 nm). Latitude codes—grift blinds—truth shines—mtDNA rules (1410 nm)—centralized misses—KFD/QE #47 burns—my 180°—Tetragrammaton: “Light’s hidden” (Part 2)—Deuterium is the arc—complexity ablaze.

# Thread: Optimal Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/optimal-journal.30361/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### TaniaC — 2025-02-26T15:57:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/optimal-journal.30361/post-347389>

Hi,
I am a fairly new member. I am slowly learning as much as I can. My mother was born/grew up near the equator (11th latitude); She has red hair, fair skin/freckles. She had severe myopia starting as a child. I grew up in upstate New York. My mother had pneumonia in her last trimester with me. I had colic from a couple months old until age 2. I had a lazy eye and was patched (no surgery) when I was 2 years old and also wore glasses for myopia. I always looked pale for most of the year, except during the summer. Interestingly, I never wanted to wear shoes growing up, I would request beef liver whenever possible ( although I was a super finicky kid and didn't like a lot of foods) and never wore sunscreen (even though I was told to).

I started to have seasonal allergies in my teens and struggled with IBS (bloating/constipation) for my entire adult life. I had 5 years of allergy shots (age 18-23). I have been in the NYC metro area for 30 years. In my 40's I started to develop food allergies and felt tired all the time. I had a sub clinical TSH in the 3's, so my MD put me on low dose Levothyroxine. I didn't really feel any different on it. I stopped it after about 10 years and my Thyroid labs have been okay. I found out about 13 years ago, I had a B12 level of 94 ( I eat animal products) and Vitamin D level of 6 (I lived in a basement apartment at the time); I also had a ferritin level of < 10 for the last 20 years. I do have uterine fibroids, but didn't really have heavy periods until close to menopause d/t was on OCP. I tried IV Iron, but it only bumped it up to 40 for a short period of time and I also had minor allergic reaction to it. I decided to eat grass fed cow liver instead.
I also developed a weird symptom-my hands would turn bright red and my hands became super hot (like fireballs). I went to a Rheumatologist and she said most likely it was an early autoimmune connective disease, but none of the tests showed I had an autoimmune disease. I was double jointed and very flexible since I was a kid. I was recently diagnosed with EDS. I tried Low dose Naltrexone, but it didn't really seem to make a difference overall. I also started to have menopausal symptoms (hot flashes, heat intolerance) for the last couple of years and had trouble with weight loss. When I discovered quantum biology towards the end of summer last year, I started getting more sun and started to feel better, but during winter my symptoms came back. My biggest issues were allergic reactions, GI (constipation and bloating) and menopausal symptoms (hot flashes at night); I did start HRT at the end of December. I recently went on vacation for a week to the Caribbean and within 4 days of being in the sun (sun on my stomach), my GI symptoms went away. I also started to have blood spotting (after 1 year of no period); When I returned from vacation, I started bleeding (thought it was menstrual bleeding) pretty severely. I had a hysteroscopy and was told there was a fibroid with a large blood vessel that was causing the bleeding. She removed the part of the fibroid that was in the uterus. I am not sure if the sun exposure caused the bleeding in this circumstance?

I have have always been a curious person. I am an RN and went back to school to obtain my NP. I still wanted to learn more, so I enrolled in a functional medicine program, half way through the curriculum, I thought it didn't seem right to take so many supplements and did not finish it. I then enrolled in a Nurse coach course, I enjoyed the learning, but didn't officially start coaching anyone. Discovering Quantum Biology has really been eye opening and feel there is so much to learn. I can't believe what I have missed and am talking to anyone who will listen to me about this  I am currently enrolled in the applied quantum biology course and trying to figure out where to go from here. I currently work part-time, but am looking to transition out of conventional healthcare. That's my story up to this point! Thanks for allowing me to share and would appreciate any thoughts/suggestions based on my story.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-26T19:04:40+0200

### Jack Kruse — 2025-02-28T15:39:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hair-color-change.30362/post-347580>

**Grey hair (lack of melanin) likely forms the same way the ATPase was formed.** Bioelectricity changes in the hair follicle via mitochondrial biophoton likely impact a gene tied to this story. The name of the hair color thief gene is IRF4. It is a gene that acts like a cog in the bioelectric machine in a cellular process that churns out melanin pigment in the hair follicle. Graying happens as follicles gradually stop producing the pigment that gives hair its color, which happens at different rates for different people due to dielectric changes in water mtDNA makes. Various people make different biophoton signals. This gives mammals variable shades of grey in their hair. Even the greying of hair in humans shows that we are not entirely at the mercy of our genes. The study found that environmental factors controlled about 70% of cases of hair graying. Genes were responsible for only about 30% of the population, at least in the Latin American cohort.

### [Researchers Identify Gene for Gray Hair: IRF4 | Sci.News](https://www.sci.news/genetics/gene-gray-hair-irf4-03670.html)

The first gene identified for graying hair has been discovered by an international team of researchers.

 www.sci.news

### [Three Streams for the Mechanism of Hair Graying - PMC](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6029974/)

Hair graying is an obvious sign of human aging. Although graying has been investigated extensively, the mechanism remains unclear. Here, we reviewed previous studies on the mechanism of graying and seek to offer some new insights. The traditional ...

 pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov

### [WHAT GREY HAIR CAN TEACH YOU](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/what-grey-hair-can-teach-you-jack-kruse/)

So you are getting more grey hair. Might this signal something more concerning happening in your cells below? The answer might surprise you.

 www.linkedin.com

### JenniferM — 2026-02-05T17:45:15+0200

### Jack Kruse — 2026-02-05T20:50:13+0200

The mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) in your hair follicles is "cloned" from your mother, but from a biological perspective, it is a bit more complex due to a phenomenon called **heteroplasmy**. Every hair follicle on your body contains mitochondria that are direct descendants of the mitochondria from your mother’s egg. Because mtDNA is passed down maternally without the "shuffling" (recombination) that happens with nuclear DNA, your follicles are essentially carrying a **clonal lineage** of your mother's energy-producing DNA.

The "Non-Clone" Reality: Heteroplasmy
If you were to sequence the mtDNA from a follicle on your head and compare it to one on your arm, they might not be 100% identical. This is due to **heteroplasmy**:

**Replication Errors:** _Mitochondria divide independently of the cell._ They lack the robust "spell-check" repair mechanisms that nuclear DNA has. This leads to a much higher mutation rate. This is why someone can get greying or whiting in one region of the body and not in others.

**The Bottleneck Effect:** During the early development of a hair follicle, only a small "sample" of mitochondria might be used to seed that specific tissue. If that sample contains a specific mutation, that follicle will have a different mitochondrial profile than its neighbor.

**Aging:** Over time, the mitochondria in a specific hair follicle may accumulate damage from oxidative stress (free radicals), causing its mtDNA to drift away from the original "clone" profile.
Why this matters for the Pax genes realted to eye and ear embryology?
Interestingly, the Pax genes I've discussed [here (Pax2/6)](https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bad-eyes-and-bad-ears-amd-tinnitus-epigenetics.32232/) live in the **nucleus**, not the mitochondria. While the Pax genes provide the structural "instructions" for where an eye or ear should form, the **mitochondria** provide the massive amount of ATP (energy) required to build those complex sensory organs during embryonic development. It turns out melanin and melanopsin play massive roles in how this is done in humans.

Atavism and the "White Hair" Signal occurs in a state of extreme stress (like Marie Antoinette), the body may use an atavistic survival program:

**Reflectivity:** White hair reflects all wavelengths of light.

**Thermal Protection:** By turning white, the mammal may be attempting to reduce its "radiative load" or change its thermal signature when its internal "melanin engine" has failed. It is a "Safe Mode" for the integumentary system because melanin is being destroyed.

In this quantum-biological framework, **hair graying/whitening** is the visible "canary in the coal mine" for a systematic failure of the **Melanopsin-POMC axis**. When the hair follicle loses its pigment, it signals that the diencephalon (the brain's internal sun) is also losing its ability to regulate the dielectric properties of its hardware.

What do I mean precisely here? I am essentially describing that the human hair follicle not just as a structural feature, but as a **biological radiator** and **photonic sensor** that is hard-wired into the brain's endocrine center.

The Melanopsin-POMC Axis: The "Internal Sun"
The **Diencephalon** (specifically the hypothalamus) acts as the central conductor of the body’s circadian and metabolic rhythm.
**Melanopsin (Opn4):** It captures blue light to entrain the Suprachiasmatic Nucleus (SCN).

**POMC (Proopiomelanocortin):** This is the master precursor molecule. In the brain, it regulates appetite and energy; in the skin/follicle, it is cleaved into alpha MSH, which triggers melanin production. When this axis fails, due to extreme "allostatic load" (stress), the system can no longer maintain the "melanin engine" in ou rhair follicles. Melanin production is chemically expensive and involves heavy oxidative "upkeep" by the colony of mitochondria in the tissue where the effect is. So if your eyelashes are white you know your retina is under polarized attack.

Melanin in mammals acts as a Dielectric Buffer to the electromagnetic spectrum. In quantum biology, melanin is often viewed as a **biological semiconductor**. It absorbs UV and high-energy photons, converting them into heat or dissipating them to ROS/RNS protect the nuclear DNA from optical electronic failure via alien UPEs.

**The Failure:** When the body is in "extreme stress" (the Marie Antoinette scenario), it enters a state of **hypometabolism** or localized "shutdown."
**The Atavism:** If the system can no longer afford the metabolic cost of maintaining the "dielectric buffer" (melanin), it reverts to a state of **reflectivity**.

White/Grey Hair as a "Safe Mode" (Thermal & Photonic)
I mentioned "Reflectivity" and "Radiative Load" above. This is where the physics of atavism becomes fascinating.

**Radiative Shielding:** White hair (which lacks melanin but is filled with air pockets/vacuoles) changes the **refractive index** of the hair shaft. It reflects a broader spectrum of light, potentially protecting the skin from further radiative damage when the internal antioxidant system (glutathione/catalase) is depleted.

**The "Hollow Tube" Effect:** In many mammals, white hair acts like a fiber-optic cable or a thermal insulator. By dropping pigment, the follicle may be attempting to optimize the **thermal signature** of the organism, reducing the heat burden on a brain that is already "overheating" from a cortisol/stress storm. Realize immediately temperature regulation controls circadian biology with light and dark cycles. So white hair cools the surface where it is and this is a big tell to the clinician what is really going on deep inside the mammal.
Hair color change is the "Canary in the Coal Mine" for the mitochondriac.
If we view the hair follicle as an extension of the **Diencephalon**, and I am saying clearly we should, then graying is a "broadcast" of an internal loss of coherence at some level in the system below the surface.

**Quantum Signaling:** If melanin is the "antenna" for certain wavelengths, its loss suggests the body is "unplugging" that antenna to save energy.

**Systemic Dielectric Failure:** The whitening of the hair is the visible manifestation of the **liquid crystalline water** in our cells losing its "charge" (exclusion zone depth), which is regulated by the light-sensing pathways I’ve identified linked to CCO operation. Recall that Copper is a transition metal used in melanin production and is a cofactor in CCO and Cardiolipin biology. When you see this biophysical link you realize that decentralized clinicians and way wiser than the centralized MDs taking care of 99.9% of modern humans.

The hair follicle and the eye are both "externalized" extensions of the central nervous system. Because they share the same **Neural Crest** origin, the bioelectric breakdown in the follicle often precedes or mirrors the "miswiring" occuring in the brain.

**The Signal:** Graying hair is the macro-scale result of **Deuterium interference** in the mitochondrial ATPase at CCO.

**The Internal Shift:** If the ATPase is stuttering in the follicle (causing gray hair via IRF4), it is likely also stuttering in the **RPE and ipRGCs**. The Pax genes are tied to RPE development.

**The Consequence:** This leads to a drop in the "quantum yield" of the **Melanopsin** system. Before you see visual failure, you see a change in **circadian entrainment** and leptin-**melanocortin** signaling.

My thesis suggests that **Canities subita** (sudden whitening) isn't just "fear turning hair white," but a radical, atavistic shift in the body's **bio-energetic profile, which is a** a desperate attempt to change how the organism interacts with the electromagnetic environment when internal resources are spent. As you read this, you should be asking yourself the following question, "_Do you think this "Safe Mode" is an attempt to make the organism "invisible" to certain predatory thermal sensors, or is it strictly an internal thermodynamic correction?_**"
What I think:** I think "safe mode" graying/whitening of hair on our surface is a quantum signal that we need melanin to control coppe, for optimized CCO and cardiolipin function before the system collapses. I'm describing the hair follicle not as an aesthetic feature, but as a
**distal reporting station** for the body's total redox potential and mitochondrial "spin" state. By linking the **Pax-regulated Neural Crest** origins to **Cytochrome c Oxidase (CCO)** and the **Melanopsin-POMC axis**, I’ve moved the conversation from "symptoms" to surface "thermodynamic signaling."

The Copper Connection: The Melanin-CCO Bridge in graying/whitening hair
My mitochondrial focus on **Copper (Cu)** is the "smoking gun" of this theory.
**The Shared Cofactor:** Tyrosinase (the rate-limiting enzyme for melanin) is copper-dependent. Similarly, CCO (Complex IV of the electron transport chain) requires copper centers (CuA and CuB) to reduce oxygen to water.

**The Resource Reallocation:** When the system faces high **Deuterium** loading or mitochondrial stress, it cannot afford to "waste" copper on pigment. The body pulls copper away from the "external antenna" (hair) to protect the "internal engine" (CCO in the brain/heart).
**The Result:** Gray hair isn't just a loss of color; it is a **copper-shunt signal**, indicating that the mitochondria are struggling to maintain the proton gradient and oxygen reduction.
I believe the same thing happens in bone between the N and P semiconductors that Becker found. This is what osteopenia/osteoporosis really is. A canary in the coal mine signal something is amiss in the organs that have higher mitochondrial capacity.
I am are essentially identifying a **unified field theory of biological semiconductors present in the mammalian body plan.**
By linking **Robert O. Becker’s** work on the bioelectric "Current of Injury" to my model of the hair follicle and CCO, I’ve hit on the **Hierarchy of Dielectric Sacrifice that must occur in disease states.** In this hierarchy, the body sacrifices the "structural" semiconductors (hair/pigment and bone) to preserve the "computational" semiconductors (the brain and heart).

The Hierarchy of Signaling: The "Peck Order" of Organs
You’ve identified a hierarchy where the body "triages" its semiconductor hardware based on the **Quantum Yield**:

1.  **Tier 1 (The Diencephalon/RPE):** The "Internal Sun." It gets the best Copper, the most EZ water, and the cleanest Protium (H+) to keep the Melanopsin-POMC axis spinning.

The POMC "Brake" and the Diencephalon
In a healthy state, the **SCN** uses light captured by melanopsin to drive the production of **Proopiomelanocortin (POMC)**.
**The Social & Stress Buffer:** POMC is cleaved into alpha MSH and Beta endorphin which buffers stress and fosters social bonding.

The body can no longer produce enough Beta endorphin to calm the system and this leads to **"Marie Antoinette"** state: a runaway stress response that further accelerates the dielectric breakdown of the remaining pigmented tissues.

Nystagmus and "Vascular Noise"
This is where the **Nystagmus** connection becomes critical. If the SCN and the diencephalic derivatives lose their "melanin shield," they will also lose their ability to chelate metals and manage **Deuterium**:

The Unified Pathophysiology
The loss of melanin (whether through albinism, aging, or rapid stress) triggers a common atavistic cascade:

1\. Melanin as the "Topological Insulator"

**The Role of 380 nm UVA in Heme Renovation

Transcriptional Stimulation:** UVA radiation (320–380 nm) strongly stimulates the expression of the human **heme oxygenase 1 (HO-1)** gene by enhancing its transcription rate. HO-1 is the rate-limiting enzyme responsible for breaking down heme into biliverdin, iron, and carbon monoxide.

**Protein-DNA Binding Alteration:** Exposure to these specific UVA wavelengths causes an immediate alteration in how specific protein complexes bind to the promoter of the heme oxygenase gene, occurring even without new protein synthesis.

**System Resync:** This process, often referred to as "engine renovation," is part of a larger photorepair mechanism involving **neuropsin (OPN5)**, which is sensitive to 380 nm light. It coordinates with molecules like **NAD+** and **SIRT1** to optimize mitochondrial function and the "melanin-semiconductor".

**Melatonin and Photoprotection**

Melanin was created on Earth before the first domains of life were present to protect the surface from UV radiation since ozone was present due to the anoxia that was primoridal. The stimulus to organize melanin was UV light and the copper ion and tryosine/phenylalanine. Melatonin was evolved soon after when the first two domains of life evolved. Melanin and melatonin evolutionary history will be forever timestamped by this UV and oxygen story. The ancient forms of melanin and melatonin were improves as life went on. **Melatonin, created inside the engine,** acts as a crucial "buffer" in this system: HOW?

**Mitochondrial Support:** Melatonin enhances mitochondrial ATP synthesis and reduces reactive oxygen species (ROS) formation triggered by UV radiation.

**Gene Reprogramming:** Melatonin induces **Nrf2-HO-1 reprogramming**, which corrects oscillatory patterns in circadian clock genes (like _Clock_, _Bmal1_, and _Per_) that may be disrupted by stress or environmental factors. People always forget the first step in heme synthesis begins inside of the matrix and it is linked to UV light exposure.

**Direct Interaction:** Melatonin can synergistically increase heme oxygenase-1 expression, providing neuroprotective and photoprotective effects.

> The MITF-AMPAR Connection: Genetic mutations here aren't "bad luck"; they are Geometric Translation Errors. When the MITF-AMPAR loop is disrupted by 2^H (Deuterium), the -secretase cannot "find the fold."
> The Result: In the brain, this leads to the amyloid "clumping" of Alzheimer’s. In the skin, it leads to the follicular occlusion of HS. It is the same Isotopic Drowning, just expressed at different ends of the Vagus Highway.
>
> **2\. Neuroectodermal Removal: The Stochastic Shock**
> Removing hair or teeth (neuroectodermal derivatives) is a systemic "Unplugging":
> The CSF Backflow: These structures act as "wicking" points or "Grounding Rods" for the 1D Lattice. When you remove them, you remove the Egress Ports for 2H.
> _Isotopic Drowning:_ The 2H that should have been "spun out" through the follicle or tooth root now backs up into the Cerebrospinal Fluid (CSF). This is how a "cosmetic" hair removal event or a dental extraction triggers the "Stochastic Shock" that eventually "craters" the brain. This is why HS leads to AD dementia if people do not fix the MITF-AMPAR loop using Nature.
>
> **3\. HS as the "Vagal Blockade"**
> HS occurs in apocrine-bearing skin (axilla/groin), the same "Pinch Points" as Acanthosis Nigricans.
> The EDAR/Melanin Destruction: The EDAR (Ectodysplasin A Receptor) pathway is responsible for the density of these appendages. When OPN5 (UV-sensing) and Leptin signaling are destroyed by artificial light (The Rockefeller Environment), the Melanin "Firewall" collapses.
> _The Clogged Exhaust:_ Without melanin’s CISS effect to keep the "forward-only" directionality, the 2H "pinches" inside the follicle. The resulting inflammation (dilation/occlusion) is the body’s "Chernobyl" attempt to vent the isotopic pressure that the Vagus/Exhaust manifold can no longer handle.
>
> **4\. Noether’s Theorem and the Meltdown**
> Symmetry = Conservation: Melanin maintains the spin-symmetry ((2)) required to conserve energy in the lattice.
> The Meltdown: 2H breaks this symmetry. In HS, the "Symmetry Breaking" is so violent that the system creates Sinus Tracts, literal physical "tunnels" in the flesh, to try and bypass the Ohmic resistance of the deuterium-clogged dermis. It is a desperate, macroscopic attempt to restore Egress

Thank you for taking the time by adding this explanation, it's a very interesting and helpful resource. Something I will re-read, try to understand to help myself and others with HS. I had several teeth removed as a child due to over crowding, yet my brothers didn't need any taken. The HS, acne comes down one side of the family and has passed on at varying stages. my father, uncle, grandfather, brother, my child, and not sure further back than that had skin inflammation and other co-morbitidies, my relatives all lived out doors a lot due to the climate in East and south African. I know by my choice of lifestyle and syncing with nature as much as I can is helping with my over all health, but I still get HS flares at times. The sun helps to heal them quicker.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-11-01T16:11:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-do-you-sneeze-when-looking-at-the-sun.30364/post-361990>

The photic sneeze reflex, also known as the [ACHOO syndrome](https://www.google.com/search?q=ACHOO+syndrome&client=safari&sca_esv=8c3c3649d84764d0&sxsrf=AE3TifPH7utGvol6iJW4O0EoRX3o2zkU_Q%3A1762001926112&ei=BgQGafDTBq-TwbkPt5WsCA&ved=2ahUKEwjl7tXKg9GQAxWeRTABHabTPCcQgK4QegQIARAD&uact=5&oq=photic+sneeze+reflex&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiFHBob3RpYyBzbmVlemUgcmVmbGV4MgUQABiABDIFEAAYgAQyBRAAGIAEMgUQABiABDIFEAAYgAQyBRAAGIAEMgUQABiABDIFEAAYgAQyBRAAGIAEMgUQABiABEiskwFQ5AdYnXxwA3gBkAEAmAHCAaABmSyqAQQ3LjQwuAEDyAEA-&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAVmS3so-Rz1Y80xID0xFKCybL8GxzOoq3FnB9sMFspQSGp3wQnUxS94jRa0ZF8CmgQMyH5Kbj-v8TynGHQjgQJ4scT4k9wEcs8VtyYYeQUO6DmaNuDsXhb6uXnwz4CsabZGn2tUabNsEdB5xpiFPZVgldh2DdCiXEZvGyhEiPa-hU&csui=3) which stands for Autosomal dominant compleling helio-opthalmic outburst syndrome. It's an inherited autosomal dominant reflex that causes people to sneeze after sudden exposure to bright light, like moving from a dim room into sunlight. I believe it is caused epigenetically due to aberrent UPE signaling during brain development. I think it is a marker for an aberrent immunse system in modern humans. It is not a formal genetic disease, but a casual base pair change due to optical signaling in the brain. It is caused by one base change of a C to a T in an intergenic region of chromosome two. There is correlative evidence that every copy of this single nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) is associated with a 1.3x increase in likelihood of having the photic sneeze reflex. I believe the change is caused by altered UPE firing due to the unique characteristics of the olfactory bulb. In fact, today I believe this reflex is a remnant of phylogeny of how we handled communicable diseases before we had our modern human immune system. In other words, it was Nature'a original vaccine system to protect the herd.

Here is the new blog discussing it. [https://www.patreon.com/posts/125243301](https://www.patreon.com/posts/125243301)

In centralized medicine the exact mechanism is not fully understood but decentralized medicine focus on light has a rather unique way of looking this disease. The small base pair change involve a crossed signal between the optic (vision) and trigeminal (sneeze) nerves. The opthalmic and maxillary division of the trigeminal nerve have a tight phylopgenic coupling and since this nerve innervates tissues with the environment this was a way to sense and expel pathogens from the nasal and repsiratory tree while in bright light so that other organisms could be infected with this pathogen at the same time they were in sunlight with UV and NIR light to confer infection and photorepair prior to our highly developed immune systems in the eukaryotic tree. So effectively this reflex is a remnant of our past. This reflex can be triggered by sunlight, camera flashes, or artificial lights and affects up to 35% of the population. There is also a reason it was designed to only affect 35% of the tribe. Can you guess why?

### PIAZ — 2025-11-01T23:06:41+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-do-you-sneeze-when-looking-at-the-sun.30364/post-362006>

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2025-11-03T19:13:15+0200

# Thread: Hello, I am new to posting on this site. I hope all is truly well. A question.....if I may?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-i-am-new-to-posting-on-this-site-i-hope-all-is-truly-well-a-question-if-i-may.30365/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Allkaryote — 2025-02-26T23:27:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-i-am-new-to-posting-on-this-site-i-hope-all-is-truly-well-a-question-if-i-may.30365/post-347430>

Dr. Kruse said he had a dark year, or difficult year after learning some truths. I completely identify with that. I worked in the medical industry as well. Although certainly not a prerequisite to be shocked or have guilt.

Covid divided my family ( beyond logic) and we lost 9 loved ones in under 2 years, and much more. They were all too young. And no, it was not their true .... time. Leave it to Western psychology to tell you your grieving "abnormally." The truth seems to come at a price as well. The metaphorical and literal math keep going despite taking a break from reading or research. Time passes differently, despite my lighting. "Aha" moments occur just about anytime. Grieving becomes rage. Anyone have a true answer to what has helped you pass this state or a similar state? And how do you function in a society that is largely unaware, When you are not yet at a place where you can be fully independent from the system.

I am sure more has been endured and suffered by others, tragically. Solution is what I am looking for. If this should help anyone else, even better.

Thank you

### Woodstock — 2025-02-27T06:02:21+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-i-am-new-to-posting-on-this-site-i-hope-all-is-truly-well-a-question-if-i-may.30365/post-347469>

First of all I am so sorry you lost family. I lost my mom who had Parkinson’s due to the masking and lockdowns which killed her mind and effectively “put her down“ prior to the vaccine in Feb ‘21. Other than that all my family has survived post jab. So this may not apply or help. Truth is, I’m over it. But do I feel things deeply? nope. Do I grieve much? Not so much. I used to be super emotional. A feely kind of person. Now if I feel it’s anger. But not like a rage or emotional anger. More like looking at the 70% that got it who still to this day think they did the right thing..,I see them as a bunch of dumbass idiot brainwashed fools that brought back the word retarded (that we all decided to stop saying because it was rude) and yet there is not really another word for it. They aremt developmentally disabled. They just chopped their own balls off and handed them over to Fauci and Gates on a silver platter. Do I still love my siblings and friends who got jabbed and also shamed ME for not doing so? Yes. But do I also think they are dumbasses? Yes. And am I angry that I can’t say anything without being gaslit? Yes. But I’ve stopped giving a shit because it’s pointless. And guess what? My self-confidence is higher than it’s ever been in my entire life. Because I let people judge me and fought with them about being right my whole life and now I KNOW I was right and that THEY are the idiots. Not me. I don’t need their validation. I suppose I have been pretty damaged since birth, so maybe this only applies to the people born broken. But right now I am thriving for the first time in my life.

### Allkaryote — 2025-06-14T14:44:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-i-am-new-to-posting-on-this-site-i-hope-all-is-truly-well-a-question-if-i-may.30365/post-354631>

Hello,

Firstly, my apologies for the delay. I have read your response more than once.

I am sorry for the loss you experienced.

I am glad to hear your confidence has grown, and not caring what people think is a form of freedom. Thank you for your response. Sincerely.

And yes, the anger I get it....I understand. The not giving a f\*\*\* what my family/friends think, I am getting there. The anger I must let go too. For my health.The sibling thing seems to go deep.

On a different note.....Woodstock. I was wondering...is there a spot on here for art or expression that conveys knowledge of quantum biology or physics. Or the warnings of modernity.

Outside of my children, music has been at times a life saver. Lost without it. So many artists seem to be aware at some level. Some with great foresight too. Rush, Tool, Tori Amos, RATM, Jack White. It goes on and on.

If the link doesn't work it is Roxy Music's " Every Dream Home a Heartache" off of "For Your Pleasure"

Brilliant

Love to all. Non politicized.... love.

### Woodstock — 2025-06-14T16:19:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-i-am-new-to-posting-on-this-site-i-hope-all-is-truly-well-a-question-if-i-may.30365/post-354632>

> Outside of my children, music has been at times a life saver. Lost without it. So many artists seem to be aware at some level. Some with great foresight too. Rush, Tool, Tori Amos, RATM, Jack White. It goes on and on.
